data.title: XRP retail adoption surges 490% while Bitcoin sees modest growth
data.description:
3-4-2025 – Glassnode’s latest insights, as reported by BlockBeats, reveal a striking divergence in the cryptocurrency landscape. XRP has emerged as a darling of retail investors in this cycle, with a remarkable 490% leap in active addresses since the market trough of 2022. Meanwhile, Bitcoin, often seen as the institutional heavyweight, has recorded a modest [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/xrp-retail-adoption-surges-490-while-bitcoin-sees-modest-growth/

data.title: Sui Launched Splash™: The First Waterpark Experience
data.description:
Sui is taking blockchain beyond finance and into entertainment with Sui Splash™. At Sui Waterpark, visitors access facilities with digital passes. These passes allow them to access their crypto wallets integrated into their wristbands. Read on for the details
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/sui-launched-splash-the-first-waterpark-experience/

data.title: Pi Coin Price Crashes 78%: Is This the End for the Once-Hyped Cryptocurrency?
data.description:
After launching its mainnet in February with high hopes, the price skyrocketed to $2. 98, making it briefly one of the top ten cryptocurrencies. But fast forward to April, and things have taken a complete U-turn
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/pi-coin-price-crashes-78-is-this-the-end-for-the-once-hyped-cryptocurrency/

data.title: EU to Vote on Countermeasures Against U.S. Steel and Aluminum Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, senior officials from the European Union have announced that EU member states are scheduled to vote on April 9 regarding countermeasures against the United States' tariffs on steel and aluminum. The decision comes in response to the tariffs imposed by the U.S., which have been a point of contention between the two economic powers. The vote will determine the EU's course of action in addressing these trade issues.

data.title: Babylon announces token economics: total 10 billion tokens, community incentives account for 15%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Babylon announced the economics of BABY tokens, with a total of 10 billion, including: community incentives (15%), ecological construction (18%), R&D and operations (18%), early private investors (30.5%), team (15%), and consultants (3.5%).

data.title: Babylon airdrop query page is now online
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Babylon airdrop query page is now online. Babylon will airdrop 600 million BABY to early adopters, accounting for 6% of the total supply. Eligible users include: Phase 1/Phase 2 stakers, Pioneer Pass NFT holders, and GitHub contributors.

data.title: Justin Sun: Met with Hong Kong Legislative Council member Wu Jiezhuang and submitted relevant materials of FDT case to regulatory and judicial authorities
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sun Yuchen posted on the X platform: "I met with Hong Kong Legislative Council member Wu Jiezhuang and reported the misappropriation of nearly US$500 million of customer reserve funds by First Digital Trust (FDT), and submitted relevant materials to regulatory agencies and judicial authorities. We are fully confident that we will recover the funds and hold those who stole the funds accountable."

data.title: Bybit and Zodia Custody reach cooperation to improve asset security
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Zodia Custody, an institutional-first digital asset platform supported by Standard Chartered Bank, Northern Trust Company, SBI Holdings, National Australia Bank and Emirates National Bank, has officially established a partnership with the cryptocurrency exchange Bybit to provide Bybit's institutional clients with secure, isolated custody and over-the-counter settlement services.
As the demands on the industry continue to increase, the market is looking forward to the introduction of more reliable infrastructure to address potential risk points in exchange settlement, including centralized control and counterparty risk.
Zodia Custody’s Interchange solution is built on regulatory-grade infrastructure, providing independent asset custody for the security issues mentioned above. Through Interchange, institutional users can instantly deploy funds for trading on Bybit, while their assets remain securely held in Zodia Custody — ensuring full segregation, zero commingling, and significantly reduced exchange risk exposure. This design neutralizes counterparty risk and eliminates the need for users to pre-fund exchange accounts, improving capital efficiency and operational integrity.

data.title: SoSoValue launches API open platform, the first batch of users can experience it for free for a limited time
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: AI-driven asset management and investment research platform SoSoValue announced the official launch of its API open platform. Based on the current open interface, developers and institutional users can directly access the ETF data dashboard and encrypted AI news source through the SoSoValue API. In the future, it will also support richer token details and AI research reports and other functions.
At present, Bybit has taken the lead in completing the deep integration of SoSoValue API and successfully applied the real-time data interface to the functional upgrade of AI investment assistant Lens. By connecting to the SoSoValue API, Bybit has not only significantly improved the comprehensiveness of the platform's asset data coverage and the accuracy of market analysis, but also achieved a full capture of key market factors such as real-time price fluctuations, in-depth market data, industry news and dynamics, and investment and financing information, providing its platform users with more comprehensive market information and more accurate investment decision-making support. In terms of data service upgrades, SafePal integrates the Feeds API to achieve real-time market conditions and information push, while BSCN builds a digital currency ETF structured data analysis framework based on the ETF API to support more accurate asset analysis and market trend tracking, meeting the diverse needs of users and institutions in the crypto market.
SoSoValue API Open Platform will officially open for applications at 18:00 Beijing time on April 3. The first 1,000 applicants can use it free of charge. The number of places is limited and first come first served.

data.title: SlowMist Warns of Phishing Links in AI Search Results for imToken
data.description: According to PANews, the SlowMist team has issued a warning after discovering phishing links in search results provided by mainstream AI assistants for the imToken website. The legitimate website address for imToken is token.im. SlowMist advises users not to rely on AI as a secure search engine and emphasizes the importance of downloading wallets from official sources and manually verifying website URLs.
